subcodes.first_line: O seeker of truth! Thy letter was received, wherein thou hadst made inquiry regarding my person. I am a lamp of divine love and a star [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طالب حق مکتوبت واصل گشت از شخص من سوال نموده بودید سراج محبت الهم و ستاره
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @spiritual transformation, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
